name: short_history_spy_vol_fallback
description: SPY history with only 15 days (< MC_MIN_HISTORY_DAYS=20). run_monte_carlo MUST short-circuit at the MC_MIN_HISTORY_DAYS guard and return the out-of-band insufficient-history sentinel (MC_INSUFFICIENT_HISTORY_SENTINEL = None) — NOT an in-band probability. This pins the EARLY short-circuit branch. Updated for Cluster 2 AC-2: the previous in-band 100.0 return was fail-dangerous (it permanently vetoed the protective trailing stop); run_monte_carlo now signals insufficient history out-of-band so the caller can distinguish 'MC could not run' from a genuine probability.
derivation: 15 < MC_MIN_HISTORY_DAYS(20): the sufficiency guard fires and run_monte_carlo returns MC_INSUFFICIENT_HISTORY_SENTINEL (None) — a distinct out-of-band signal, not an in-band probability. The test asserts the return IS the sentinel (None / not a [0,100] float); no producer probability is pinned because there is none — the function short-circuits before the Monte Carlo draw.
